title: Fisher Tiger Protects Koala
description: On pages 12–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is fisher tiger protects koala.
scene: The scene follows fisher tiger protects koala, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're stealing one of the Marine vessels !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As a result of the Ambush ...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...the sun pirates were taken unawares, and their captain mortality wounded...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, they succeeded in stealing a marine vessel and escaping to open waters ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've lost too much blood!! If you don't have a blood transfusion soon, you're not going to make it ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your blood type is extremely rare... there's nobody in our crew who is a suitable match!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: But... the blood ... the blood samples stored on this ship... *pant* ... are human blood... are they not...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: That's right! Human blood is no different from our own!!! We can use it to save you....!! It's your only chance!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I will begin the process immediately ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to live on with their blood in my veins!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That blood is tainted!! .....It's the blood of those who have scorned us all their lives!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I refuse to be in their debt!!! I will not accept their pity....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't want you... to know about this... on my final voyage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This last trip certainly took you a while!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world did you witness on your latest journey ...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not long after I set out... *Pant *... I was captured!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They took me to MarieJoa ... I was there for years....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: I managed to escape with my life...... but I could not abandon the other slaves I had witnessed all around me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have lived according to my selfish wishes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and as a result, caused great trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Peace for everyone - that is what we should all strive for!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... we're not the ones... who can really change things for our people ...

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: It's only the next generation ... children like Koala, who still know nothing... that can do that.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I beg of you!! Don't tell anything of this to the people of fish-man Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of the tragedy that has befallen us!! or of our rage towards the humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are countless kind-hearted humans out there in this world!! I understand that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And yet... as we die and vanish from this world...! We leave nothing behind us but resentment and hatred!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...my mind can see the truth, but the demon in my heart stands firm!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My body... Refuses to accept their blood!!!...

summary: Fisher Tiger Protects Koala. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
